exampleSentencesTranslated: He often sits on the grass to read books in the afternoon.
The front yard of my house has a lot of green grass in the summer.
She likes to walk barefoot on the grass when it is cool.

definitions.vi: Một loại cây phổ biến có lá hẹp, mọc ở cánh đồng và vườn.
definitions.es: Una planta común con hojas estrechas que crece en campos y jardines.
definitions.en: A common plant with narrow leaves that grows in fields and gardens.

example.en: The grass is green and grows everywhere.
example.es: La hierba es verde y crece por todas partes.
example.vi: Cỏ xanh tươi mọc khắp nơi.

notes_md:
**cỏ** = grass. The green plant that covers the ground in fields, parks, lawns.

It’s an uncountable noun, so you usually don’t use a classifier. To talk about areas or groups, use words like **bãi cỏ** (grassy area/lawn) or **bụi cỏ** (clump of grass).

Common pairings: **cỏ xanh** (green grass), **cắt cỏ** (cut the grass), **mọc cỏ** (grass grows), **cỏ dại** (weeds/wild grass).

Related word: **cỏ cây** = plants/vegetation in general (a bit broader than just grass).
notes:
cỏ = grass. The green plant that covers the ground in fields, parks, lawns.

It’s an uncountable noun, so you usually don’t use a classifier. To talk about areas or groups, use words like bãi cỏ (grassy area/lawn) or bụi cỏ (clump of grass).

Common pairings: cỏ xanh (green grass), cắt cỏ (cut the grass), mọc cỏ (grass grows), cỏ dại (weeds/wild grass).

Related word: cỏ cây = plants/vegetation in general (a bit broader than just grass).
exampleSentences: Anh thường ngồi trên cỏ để đọc sách vào buổi chiều.
Sân trước nhà em có rất nhiều cỏ xanh vào mùa hè.
Chị thích đi chân trần trên cỏ khi trời mát.
